event.summary: Entered validation with a deterministic command, instruction, graph, and device-impact plan.

acceptance.proof: The LSLC-001V PowerShell wrapper ends with exactly one LF and the complete public-baseline-to-corrected-head diff has no whitespace error.
The accepted LSLC-001V receipt remains byte-identical and continues to describe only its original head; the correction has a separate current receipt.
The corrected wrapper still invokes the unchanged focused checker and all V/U/T/O/S evidence gates pass.

The full source-only suite and portable workflow contracts pass at the corrected head with no behavior, dependency, feature, device, runtime effect, socket, network, transport operation, or Manifold authority expansion.
